meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for LG repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: LG Phone Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: LG phone repair specialists in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, charging port repair for LG Velvet, V series, G series, Stylo & all legacy models. We keep your LG running!
page.h1: LG Phone Repair in Winnipeg, MB
page.heroDescription: Even though LG exited the smartphone market, we continue to support all LG devices in Winnipeg. From the innovative LG Wing to the reliable Stylo series, we keep your LG phone running strong.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: OLED and LCD display replacements for LG Velvet, V series, G series, and Stylo devices.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life to your LG phone. Same-day replacement for most models.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: USB-C and micro USB charging port diagnosis and repair for all LG devices.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Front, rear, and wide-angle camera replacements for all LG models.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix speakers, earpieces, and Boombox audio systems on LG devices.

services.name: Power Button Repair
services.description: Repair stuck or non-responsive power and volume buttons on all LG models.

advantage_pillars.title: LG Legacy Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: We continue to support LG devices long after others have stopped.

advantage_pillars.title: Parts Still Available
advantage_pillars.description: We maintain supplier relationships for LG parts that others can't source.

advantage_pillars.title: Dual Screen & Wing Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We repair unique LG innovations including Dual Screen cases and the LG Wing swivel mechanism.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: LG V Series
model_categories.description: Premium V series with Quad DAC audio.

models_description: We repair all LG smartphone models. As Winnipeg's LG legacy support specialists, we maintain parts for older devices others won't service.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: LG repair costs depend on the model and parts availability—as a discontinued brand, some parts require specialty sourcing. LG's Canadian support portal still provides basic documentation.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that repairing an older LG device can sometimes cost more than expected due to limited parts supply. iFixit's LG phone teardowns remain useful for understanding repairability.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense for your LG's current value, we'll explain alternatives.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair LG phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops in Winnipeg still specializing in LG devices.

faqs.question: Can you still get LG phone parts in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We maintain supplier relationships for LG parts. Popular Velvet, V series, and Stylo parts are often in stock.

faqs.question: How long does LG screen repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most LG screen replacements are completed same-day, typically within 1-2 hours once parts are available.

faqs.question: Is it worth repairing my LG phone?
faqs.answer: We'll provide an honest assessment. Many LG phones are well-built and worth repairing.

faqs.question: Can you repair LG Dual Screen accessories?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair LG Dual Screen cases and the unique LG Wing swivel mechanism.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

cta.smsMessage: Hi, I found your site searching for LG repair. Can you help?

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
